title: MikroTik UP1302C-12 - 12v 10.8A power supply for CCR1036 r2
description: MikroTik UP1302C-12 is a replacement internal power supply that is specially designed for some MikroTik devices. Total power is 130W at 12V and 10.8A max. current CCR1036-8G-2S+EM (rev. 2) CCR1036-8G-2S+ (rev. 2) CCR1036-12G-4S-EM (rev. 2) CCR1036-12G-4S (rev. 2) CCR2116-12G-4S+
